title: I-929, Petition for Qualifying Family Member of a U-1 Nonimmigrant
description: Petitions for qualifying family members of certain U-1 nonimmigrants.

fields.tooltip: Part 4. Processing Information. 2. Is the person named in Part 2 or has this person ever been in deportation or removal proceedings in the United States? B. Select Yes (Indicate when and where).
